𝗣𝗢𝗭𝗡𝗢𝗧𝗘 | A self-hosted platform for personal or team note-taking, documentation, and task management.  🔥 Super Hot!

•••••••••••••••••••••••

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📜 JavaScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: A self-hosted platform for personal or team note-taking, documentation, and task management.
📅 Created: Aug 2025 • Updated: Jun 2026

•••••••••••••••••••••••

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Note-taking and documentation
✅ Self-hosted web application
✅ Docker support for easy installation
✅ Git synchronization
✅ Backup and export functionality
✅ Offline view
✅ Multi-user support
✅ API documentation
✅ Chrome Extension


•••••••••••••••••••••••

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Poznote is a self-hosted, open-source note-taking and documentation platform built with JavaScript. It allows users to create and manage notes, tasks, and wikis, with features like Git synchronization, backup/export, and offline viewing.

•••••••••••••••••••••••

𝗖𝗢𝗟𝗢𝗧𝗔 | Enabling users to track their location privately and securely by sending data to their own server, with comprehensive offline capabilities.  🔥 Super Hot!

🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Enabling users to track their location privately and securely by sending data to their own server, with comprehensive offline capabilities.
📅 Created: Jan 2026 • Updated: Jun 2026

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Self-Hosted data transmission
✅ Privacy-focused (no analytics/telemetry)
✅ Offline functionality (export, maps)
✅ Encrypted backups
✅ Location history and trip segmentation
✅ Geofencing
✅ Customizable tracking profiles
✅ Flexible sync options (Wi-Fi, VPN)
✅ App shortcuts and deep links
✅ Multiple authentication methods (Basic Auth, Token, mTLS)

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Colota is a self-hosted GPS location tracking application for Android devices. It prioritizes user privacy by sending location data directly to a user-controlled server without any analytics or telemetry, and offers robust offline functionality.

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

𝗙𝗢𝗥𝗚𝗘 | Enhancing the reliability and robustness of tool-calling and agentic workflows for self-hosted Large Language Models.  🔥 Super Hot!

▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Enhancing the reliability and robustness of tool-calling and agentic workflows for self-hosted Large Language Models.
📅 Created: Feb 2026 • Updated: Jun 2026

▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Reliability layer for self-hosted LLM tool-calling
✅ Guardrails: rescue parsing, retry nudges, response validation
✅ Opt-in workflow structure: required_steps, prerequisites, terminal_tool
✅ Proxy server mode (OpenAI/Anthropic APIs) for transparent guardrails
✅ WorkflowRunner for structured agent loops with SlotWorker for shared inference slots
✅ Guardrails middleware for integration into custom orchestration loops
✅ Supports Ollama, llama-server (llama.cpp), Llamafile, vLLM, and Anthropic backends
✅ Performance improvements on local models


▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 2.1K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 156 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 6 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Forge is a Python framework designed to enhance the reliability of self-hosted Large Language Model (LLM) tool-calling and agentic workflows. It acts as a reliability layer, applying guardrails such as response validation, parsing rescue, and retry nudges to LLM interactions, even without predefined workflow structures. Forge can be used as a proxy server, a workflow runner, or as middleware within existing orchestration loops, supporting various local and cloud-based LLM backends.

▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/antoinezambelli/forge

Streambert is a cross-platform Electron desktop application designed for streaming and downloading movies, TV series, and anime. It offers a user-friendly interface with features like subtitle management, library tracking, and customization, while ensuring a completely ad-free and tracker-free experience.
